title: cyperus laevigatus subsp. laevigatus
intro: Cyperus laevigatus subsp. laevigatus, also known as the smooth flat sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is native to tropical Asia and Africa, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of Cyperus laevigatus subsp. laevigatus are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
